title: Extend streaming backend with richer event types
description: Add new event types to streaming surface: session_start, session_end, heartbeat, checkpoint, user_intervention. Update streaming_types.rs and streaming.rs to support these new event categories.

title: Expose richer streaming metrics
description: Expand /api/v1/metrics streaming section with: connection_duration histogram, events_per_second gauge, client_latency_ms histogram, stream_health score.

title: Implement signed URL surface integration
description: Add signed URL generation for streaming resources. Implement token-based auth query param support for SSE connections. Ensure secure signed URL flow.

title: Extend UI StreamingDashboard with new panels
description: Add StreamingDashboard component with: Hands panel, MCP panel, Task panel, Stats panel. Wire up EventSource hooks for real-time consumption. Ensure AgentZero-styled theming.

title: Ensure UI accessibility for streaming panels
description: Add ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management, screen reader announcements for streaming events. Pass axe-core tests.

title: Add end-to-end streaming tests
description: Create integration tests for streaming surface: auth flow, event delivery, reconnection, signed URL flow. Minimum 10 new tests covering happy path and error cases.

title: Update STREAMING_ROLLOUT.md with Phase 1 acceptance criteria
description: Document concrete acceptance criteria for Phase 1: event types, metrics exposed, SLO targets, UI panels wired, test coverage minimums.

title: Create Phase 1 runbook
description: Create runbook for streaming incident response: high latency, connection drops, auth failures. Include debug commands and escalation paths.

title: Phase 1 gate review
description: Run gate review against criteria 1.1-1.6. Document results in phase1_gating.md. Get sign-off to proceed to Phase 2.
